SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl

Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.ministry.impl

package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.ministry.impl
This package contains implementations for handling ministry data within the internal application. Key classes: - ViewRiksdagenGovermentRoleMember: Represents a view of Riksdagen government role member data. - ViewRiksdagenMinistry: Represents a view of Riksdagen ministry data. Annotations: - @XmlSchema: Defines the XML namespace and element form default for the package.
